_comment: Per-journey RecordStore wiring for the three §11 demo journeys. The step layer (steps/record_query_step.py) reads this to build a LocalFolderRecordStore with the right root + per-department behavior. Department names match what the Custodian/Search agent emits (and the agent fixtures); behaviors are the four §7 controllable responses. All record TEXT lives in the per-department folders under each journey root. Obviously synthetic, no real PII.

A.description: Fast-track: clean single-department request, one responsive record, no exemption material -> Review yields 0 proposals.

B.description: Orchestration: broad request fans out to three departments; one slow (reminder), one silent (escalation), one responded.

C.description: Governance: every department responds with exemption-triggering content -> Review proposes b5 (deliberative), b6 (PII), b7c (law-enforcement personal info).
